title: hsawbit SDS Plus Hammer Drill Bits 12mm x 160mm x 3, SDS Masonry Dill Bit Cross Tip Carbide Drill bit for Brick Walls, Concrete, Stone
features: Package Contains: 3pcs 12mm x 160mm masonry drill bit
Superior SDS Plus Drill Bit: Made of YG8C carbide with brazing and hardening for a longer service life.
Greater Precision: The cross centring tip for easier penetration of the material and drilling a precise hole.
Higher Efficiency: This masonry drill bit have optimised double spiral geometry flute allows efficient removal of chips & debirs.
For hammer drilling in masonry, concrete, reinforced concrete, brick and stone
description: Item Specifics SDS-PLUS Shank 4-Cutter Head The optimal geometry of the 4-cutter head havea larger bearing area ensures fast and accuratedrilling. Material: High grade steel with zinc plating Tungsten carbide tip Cuts through masonry, stone, brick, tile, plastics and concrete
